hero.desc: Global Leader in UV & MIR Optical Systems. Defining the new standards of industrial precision for next-generation manufacturing.

features.precisionDesc: Achieving nano-scale accuracy in light distribution for consistent, high-yield production.
features.energyDesc: Lichtzen's MIR technology reduces energy consumption by over 30% compared to traditional methods.
features.globalDesc: Trusted by market leaders in Battery, Display, and Semiconductor industries worldwide.

About.ceoMessage: We are not just a manufacturer; we are your strategic engineering partner. By mastering the physical properties of light, we empower the technological evolution of our clients.
About.rndDesc: Since 2010, the Lichtzen R&D Center has pioneered industrial optical physics.

timeline.2010: Lichtzen Co., Ltd. Founded (Specializing in UV/IR Optical Physics)
timeline.2013: Certified as Venture Enterprise & Acquired ISO 9001/14001 Quality Certificates
timeline.2016: Establishment of Corporate R&D Center (Dedicated to Optical Engineering)
timeline.2019: Localization of MIR Drying Systems for EV Battery Electrode Production
timeline.2022: Global Market Expansion (Achieved $10M+ in Annual Export Revenue)
timeline.2024: Launch of Next-Gen Intelligent UV Curing Platform Solutions

values.precision: Nano-scale accuracy in irradiation control systems.
values.sustainability: Eco-friendly industrial processes with optimized energy footprints.
values.innovation: Redefining manufacturing paradigms for display and battery sectors.

Applications.title: Industrial Solutions
Applications.desc: Where precision meets performance. Lichtzen's technologies empower the world's most sophisticated manufacturing lines.

battery.name: Secondary Battery (EV)
battery.title: Electrode Deep-Drying Solutions
battery.desc: MIR systems penetrate the core of coated electrodes, ensuring rapid solvent evaporation and superior quality control.

oled.name: Display (OLED)
oled.title: Precision UV Bonding & Repair
oled.desc: Advanced wavelength control and cooling technology ensure no organic degradation during high-resolution display manufacturing.

uvRoll.title: UV Roll-to-Roll System
uvRoll.desc: Elite performance for continuous high-speed manufacturing with extreme curing uniformity.

mirSystem.title: MIR Specialty Drying System
mirSystem.desc: Innovative Medium-wave Infrared heating solutions for high-performance battery electrode drying.

spotUv.title: Precision Spot UV Curing
spotUv.desc: Ultra-high intensity spot systems for terminal assembly and precision component fixing.

Support.desc: From engineering consultancy to technical support, our specialized team is ready to assist your inquiry.

Technology.title: The Science of Optical Precision
Technology.subtitle: Core Competency
Technology.desc: Lichtzen doesn't just build equipment. We engineer light. Through rigorous simulation and spectral analysis, we deliver unmatched performance in UV and IR applications.

precision.title: Optical Simulation
precision.desc: Advanced Ray-tracing and flux analysis to ensure 99.9% energy uniformity across the target surface.

spectrum.title: Spectrum Engineering
spectrum.desc: Customized wavelength tuning for specific material absorption rates, maximizing efficiency.

thermal.title: Precision Thermal Control
thermal.desc: Multi-zone temperature monitoring and feedback loops for stable process environments.

rdStep1.title: Spectral Testing
rdStep1.desc: We measure the exact absorption spectrum of your materials to design the perfect cure.

rdStep2.title: Prototyping
rdStep2.desc: Rapid iteration of reflector geometries for optimized energy distribution.
